Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS
COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Authorizes Janay Gasparini, a part-time police officer, with the town of New Paltz police department to take the civil service examination
Summary: Authorizes Janay Gasparini, a part-time police officer, with the town of New Paltz police department to take the civil service examination and be eligible for appointment as a full time police officer for the town of New Paltz.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing Janay M. Gasparini to take the competitive civil service examination for the position of police officer and be placed on the eligible list for employment as a full-time police officer for the town of New Paltz
